_doc: Fringe/arbitrage/edge mechanism matrix — ~100 ways to extract crypto edge, researched June 2026. Fields: cat, how (1-line), cap (capital: none/low/med/high), skill, risk, legal (legal/gray/AVOID), build (can WE build it now, keyless+paper-first+mesh: yes/partial/no), stack (which of our systems it plugs into). HONEST + PRINCIPLED: predatory/illegal mechanisms (sandwich, wash, honeypot, rug, pump-dump) are catalogued for landscape awareness but flagged AVOID — we do NOT build edges whose profit comes from harming other users. Our energy goes to legit arbitrage, market-making, fee-capture-with-value, and yield. Paper/sim-first; real execution gated to the operator.

mechanisms.name: CEX↔DEX arbitrage
mechanisms.how: buy cheap on one venue, sell dear on the other
mechanisms.note: Classic. Needs inventory on both sides + fast execution.

mechanisms.name: Triangular arbitrage
mechanisms.how: A→B→C→A loop on one venue when cross-rates misalign
mechanisms.note: Single-venue, no transfer risk. Detectable from order books.

mechanisms.name: Cross-chain arbitrage
mechanisms.how: same asset priced differently across chains

mechanisms.name: Funding-rate arbitrage
mechanisms.how: long spot / short perp, collect funding
mechanisms.note: We already harvest this — proven specialist edge.

mechanisms.name: Spatial (cross-CEX) arb
mechanisms.how: same pair, two exchanges, price gap

mechanisms.name: Stablecoin depeg arb
mechanisms.how: buy USDT/USDC/DAI below peg, redeem/sell at peg
mechanisms.note: Tail risk = real depeg. Size small.

mechanisms.name: Cash-and-carry basis
mechanisms.how: long spot / short dated future, capture basis to expiry

mechanisms.name: Flash-loan arbitrage
mechanisms.how: borrow→arb→repay atomically, capital-free
mechanisms.note: Zero-capital but needs onchain contract + gas wars. Elite tier.

mechanisms.name: Aggregator routing gap
mechanisms.how: exploit suboptimal aggregator routes

mechanisms.name: NFT cross-market floor arb
mechanisms.how: buy under-floor on one marketplace, list higher on another
mechanisms.note: Illiquid; floor can move under you.

mechanisms.name: Backrun arbitrage (MEV)
mechanisms.how: trade right after a big swap to capture the revert
mechanisms.note: Legit MEV. Needs searcher infra + bundle submission.

mechanisms.name: Liquidation keeper
mechanisms.how: close undercollateralized loans for the liquidation bonus
mechanisms.note: Aave/Compound bonuses. Gas-race but legal + useful.

mechanisms.name: JIT liquidity
mechanisms.how: add LP just before a big swap, remove after, take the fee

mechanisms.name: Flashbots arb bundle
mechanisms.how: atomic DEX arb via private bundle
mechanisms.note: Legit; dominated by a dozen elite teams.

mechanisms.name: Oracle-update backrun
mechanisms.how: trade immediately on an oracle price update

mechanisms.name: MEV-share rebate capture
mechanisms.how: collect kickbacks from MEV-share order flow

mechanisms.name: Sandwich attack
mechanisms.how: front + back a victim's swap for the spread
mechanisms.note: PREDATORY — profits by worsening users' execution. We do NOT build this.

mechanisms.name: Mempool mint snipe
mechanisms.how: snipe NFT mints from the mempool

mechanisms.name: Passive AMM LP
mechanisms.how: provide liquidity, earn swap fees
mechanisms.note: Impermanent loss is the cost. Baseline yield.

mechanisms.name: Concentrated-liquidity LP
mechanisms.how: tight Uniswap-v3 ranges for amplified fees
mechanisms.note: Active range mgmt = our grid's onchain cousin.

mechanisms.name: GLFT/Avellaneda-Stoikov MM
mechanisms.how: inventory-skewed two-sided quotes
mechanisms.note: We HAVE this — the regime-gated skewed grid.

mechanisms.name: Maker grid
mechanisms.how: layered limit orders harvest oscillation

mechanisms.name: Funding-harvest MM
mechanisms.how: quote + selectively harvest funding extremes

mechanisms.name: Options writing
mechanisms.how: sell covered calls / cash-secured puts for premium
mechanisms.note: Premium income; tail risk on the short.

mechanisms.name: LST peg MM
mechanisms.how: quote LST↔underlying around the peg

mechanisms.name: RFQ market making
mechanisms.how: quote request-for-quote flow

mechanisms.name: Inventory rebalancing
mechanisms.how: keep LP/MM inventory delta-balanced

mechanisms.name: Delta-neutral funding
mechanisms.how: hedged spot/perp to isolate funding carry

mechanisms.name: Leveraged staking loop
mechanisms.how: stake→borrow→restake repeatedly
mechanisms.note: Liquidation cascade risk if peg slips.

mechanisms.name: LRT points loop
mechanisms.how: restake for points + airdrop while earning yield

mechanisms.name: Pendle PT/YT yield trade
mechanisms.how: split + trade fixed vs variable yield

mechanisms.name: Stable yield rotation
mechanisms.how: chase best stablecoin APY across protocols

mechanisms.name: RWA / tokenized T-bills
mechanisms.how: hold tokenized treasuries for ~risk-free yield

mechanisms.name: Vote-bribe markets
mechanisms.how: sell governance votes for bribes (Votium/Convex)
mechanisms.note: Recurring bribe income on locked tokens.

mechanisms.name: Lending-rate arb
mechanisms.how: borrow low on one protocol, lend high on another

mechanisms.name: LP incentive farming
mechanisms.how: provide liquidity for token incentives

mechanisms.name: Yield+points stacking
mechanisms.how: one position earns yield AND points AND fees
mechanisms.note: Capital efficiency = stack 3 returns on 1 deposit.

mechanisms.name: Run a trading bot, charge fee
mechanisms.how: users trade through your bot, you take ~1%/trade
mechanisms.note: Banana Gun/Trojan model — $2.29B/yr industry. Real business if we host it.

mechanisms.name: Copy-trade vault (perf fee)
mechanisms.how: run a vault, others copy, you take performance fee
mechanisms.note: Our omnione edge becomes a fee-earning product. Needs disclosures.

mechanisms.name: Telegram sniper bot fee
mechanisms.how: memecoin-sniper bot charging per-trade

mechanisms.name: Referral / affiliate rev-share
mechanisms.how: refer users to exchanges/bots, earn fee cut
mechanisms.note: Zero-capital, fully legit. Stack with the dashboard/content.

mechanisms.name: Validator commission
mechanisms.how: run a validator, take staking commission
mechanisms.note: PoS validating is allowed on the VPS (unlike PoW). Real infra rent.

mechanisms.name: Relayer/sequencer fees
mechanisms.how: run relayer/co-sequencer infra, take fees

mechanisms.name: Sell RPC access
mechanisms.how: run full nodes, sell RPC endpoints
mechanisms.note: Infra-as-a-service; the mesh can host nodes.

mechanisms.name: Liquidity-as-a-service
mechanisms.how: rent your liquidity to protocols for a fee

mechanisms.name: Sell signals / data
mechanisms.how: package omnione's analytics as a paid feed
mechanisms.note: Our harmonics/regime analytics as a product. Zero-capital.

mechanisms.name: Keeper/cron bot rewards
mechanisms.how: run keeper bots that trigger protocol upkeep for rewards

mechanisms.name: Token transfer tax
mechanisms.how: launch a token with buy/sell tax to a treasury
mechanisms.note: Gray→AVOID if used to trap holders (honeypot). Not our play.

mechanisms.name: Cross-venue funding carry
mechanisms.how: long funding on venue A, short on venue B

mechanisms.name: Perp-spot basis
mechanisms.how: capture perp premium/discount vs spot

mechanisms.name: Futures calendar spread
mechanisms.how: long near / short far (or reverse) on term structure

mechanisms.name: Volatility arbitrage
mechanisms.how: trade implied vs realized vol
mechanisms.note: We have vol estimators — IV vs RV is buildable in sim.

mechanisms.name: Vol-surface / skew arb
mechanisms.how: exploit mispriced skew/term across strikes
mechanisms.note: Needs options market access + greeks engine.

mechanisms.name: Liquidation-cascade fade
mechanisms.how: buy into forced-sell waterfalls, exit on bounce
mechanisms.note: Maps to the user's 'when it MOVES' thesis. Sim-testable.

mechanisms.name: Perp-DEX points farming
mechanisms.how: trade volume on Hyperliquid etc. for points
mechanisms.note: Volume → airdrop; doubles as COIN-M practice.

mechanisms.name: Negative-funding harvest
mechanisms.how: get PAID to hold when funding flips negative
mechanisms.note: Selective; we already gate on funding z-score.

mechanisms.name: Funding-sign-flip detector
mechanisms.how: catch the moment funding flips → regime signal

mechanisms.name: Retroactive airdrop farming
mechanisms.how: genuine usage now → qualify for future drop
mechanisms.note: Already in the Farm command center.

mechanisms.name: Points arbitrage
mechanisms.how: buy underpriced points pre-TGE on secondary markets

mechanisms.name: Testnet node farming
mechanisms.how: run incentivized testnet nodes (mesh edge)

mechanisms.name: Governance participation drops
mechanisms.how: vote/delegate to qualify for governance airdrops

mechanisms.name: DePIN reward→token arb
mechanisms.how: earn DePIN rewards, sell/hold the token optimally
mechanisms.note: Our DePIN streams already feed this.

mechanisms.name: Pre-TGE OTC allocation
mechanisms.how: acquire/flip allocations before listing

mechanisms.name: Prediction-market arb
mechanisms.how: same event, different odds across books → lock profit
mechanisms.note: Polymarket vs Kalshi vs sportsbooks. Also a sentiment FEED for omnione.

mechanisms.name: PM liquidity provision
mechanisms.how: market-make prediction markets for spread

mechanisms.name: Resolution-info edge
mechanisms.how: superior/faster read on an event outcome
mechanisms.note: The 'world-song' read on geopolitics → bet before repricing.

mechanisms.name: News-latency repricing
mechanisms.how: fast news ingestion → bet before market reprices

mechanisms.name: Sportsbook↔crypto-PM arb
mechanisms.how: odds gaps between sportsbooks and crypto PMs

mechanisms.name: NFT mint-and-flip
mechanisms.how: mint hot drops, flip on secondary

mechanisms.name: Floor sweeping
mechanisms.how: sweep underpriced floor, relist higher

mechanisms.name: Memecoin momentum snipe
mechanisms.how: early entry on momentum memecoins
mechanisms.note: Maps to the $100 moonshot. Lottery EV.

mechanisms.name: Bonding-curve early buy
mechanisms.how: buy early on pump.fun-style curves

mechanisms.name: Liquidity-add snipe
mechanisms.how: buy the instant LP is added to a new pool

mechanisms.name: Dust consolidation
mechanisms.how: sweep/sell dust balances across wallets

mechanisms.name: NFT-lending arb
mechanisms.how: borrow against NFTs, deploy capital, arb the rate

mechanisms.name: NFT trait arbitrage
mechanisms.how: buy underpriced rare traits below trait-floor

mechanisms.name: Stable mint/redeem arb
mechanisms.how: arb the mint/redeem peg of a stablecoin

mechanisms.name: Bridge-rebalancing incentives
mechanisms.how: bridge to where protocols pay to rebalance liquidity
mechanisms.note: Get paid to move liquidity to the thin side.

mechanisms.name: Rebase-token arb
mechanisms.how: trade around rebase events / elastic supply

mechanisms.name: Oracle-latency arb
mechanisms.how: trade against a stale oracle before it updates

mechanisms.name: Auction sniping
mechanisms.how: edge in Dutch/English protocol auctions

mechanisms.name: Launchpad allocation flip
mechanisms.how: win IDO/ICO allocation, flip on listing

mechanisms.name: Listing-announcement monitor
mechanisms.how: detect new CEX listings fast, position legally on the move
mechanisms.note: Public-info latency edge — fits the conductor.

mechanisms.name: New-pool first-buyer
mechanisms.how: be the first legit buyer on a new pool

mechanisms.name: Wash-trade incentive farming
mechanisms.how: self-trade to farm volume-based rewards

mechanisms.name: Gas-token arb
mechanisms.how: mint gas tokens cheap, burn when gas spikes

mechanisms.name: Latency/colocation arb
mechanisms.how: win the speed race on cross-exchange gaps
mechanisms.note: HFT tier; our SG box has some proximity but not colo.

mechanisms.name: AI sentiment pre-positioning
mechanisms.how: AI reads news/social/geopolitics → position before the crowd
mechanisms.note: THE conductor edge — make music from the noise, ahead of the move.

mechanisms.name: Funding+momentum regime combo
mechanisms.how: combine funding extremes with momentum onset
mechanisms.note: Composite of two edges we already have.

mechanisms.name: Statistical pairs / cointegration
mechanisms.how: trade mean-reverting cointegrated pairs
mechanisms.note: We have the Kalman/cointegration math already.

mechanisms.name: Cross-asset lead-lag
mechanisms.how: trade crypto off correlated stock/FX/rates moves
mechanisms.note: User's 'play the stock market to help crypto' — already dossiered.
